summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Skandiamäklarna Etableringschef-Dashboard. All 22 backend pytest tests pass (health, KPIs, offices/brokers/listings read+search, prospects CRUD+status+activity, goals CRUD, geo municipalities+whitespots, scrape run+status, AI research-brief via Claude, reminders skipped branch + due, CSV exports). Frontend pages load correctly: Dashboard (KPIs 30/212/547/6, pipeline bar chart, goals progress bars, activity feed), Pipeline (6 kanban columns with 6 seeded prospects, prospect sheet drawer opens with editable fields, AI 'Generera' button triggers Claude brief), Offices (30 rows, search filter to 4 'Stockholm' works, CSV button visible), Brokers (212 rows with avatars + CSV), Map (react-leaflet renders Sweden with circles + whitespots table sorted by opportunity_score), Scrape (button triggers /api/scrape/run which returns status=blocked as expected from real site bot detection, UI renders the blocked state gracefully), Settings (3 editable goals, 'Lägg till mål' form, 'Nästa 14 dagar' reminders with 'Skicka mejl' buttons), Sidebar navigation between all 7 pages works.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing Description/aria-describedby — non-blocking a11y warning in console. Add a <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby for screen-reader accessibility.

action_items: (Optional/cosmetic) Add DialogDescription / aria-describedby to ProspectSheet drawer to silence Radix a11y warning.

(Heads-up only, no fix needed) ai_service.py uses model id 'claude-sonnet-4-6' (not '4-5' as the spec wording 'Sonnet 4.5' might suggest). End-to-end works fine — confirm with main agent that this is intentional.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~670 lines — still manageable but approaching the 700-line guideline; consider splitting routes into routers/ modules if it grows.
_ensure_seed() runs on every startup but only when offices collection is empty — correctly idempotent. Good.
All endpoints exclude MongoDB _id via projections and a _strip_id helper — good.
Pydantic models used for all POST/PATCH payloads — input validation is solid.
CORS uses os.environ.get('CORS_ORIGINS','*') with comma split — fine for single-user dev; tighten for prod.
scrape_run logs activity and persists run metadata + upserts scraped offices into separate collection without overwriting seed — clean separation.
Reminder endpoint correctly returns status=skipped (HTTP 200) when no recipient/key, instead of throwing — matches spec.
seed_data_creation: Test created and cleaned up TEST_Anna Andersson prospect and TEST_Goal during pytest run (full create→read→update→status→delete→404 cycle).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend routes verified at https://recruiter-dash-10.preview.emergentagent.com via pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Re-run with `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. AI brief endpoint takes ~10-15s (Claude Sonnet via Emergent LLM Key). Scrape endpoint hits real skandiamaklarna.se; status=blocked is the normal/expected outcome and is treated as success. Seeded data: 30 offices, 212 brokers, 547 listings, 6 prospects (one per pipeline status), 3 goals. Frontend uses Swedish labels everywhere ('Översikt' instead of 'Dashboard', etc.) — match by partial text or data-testid.
